title: hoplizo #3695
definition:
1) to arm, furnish with arms
 2) to provide
 3) to furnish one's self with a thing (as with arms)
 4) metaph. take on the same mind
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to arm, furnish with arms
 2) to provide
 3) to furnish one's self with a thing (as with arms)
 4) metaph. take on the same mind

    NASB:  to make ready, to equip:
